item.description:
Release v4.17.0

Changes since v4.16.0

  • bugfix: fix a bug
  • docs(AskUserPlugin): add coverage matrix and architecture overview to README
  • docs(LumiAppKit): add README and .gitignore
  • feat: add EditorPanel plugin localization support
  • feat(auto-task-plugin): clean up completed tasks and stop auto-continuation at limit
  • feat(core): unify boot with provider-driven tool validation and editor bootstrap
  • feat(editor-file-tree-v2): unify file tree and package dependencies into one collection view
  • feat(EditorCallHierarchy,EditorReferences,EditorStickySymbolBar): add i18n and Tests placeholder
  • feat(EditorOutlinePlugin): add i18n and Tests placeholder
  • feat(EditorSearchPlugin): add i18n and Tests placeholder
  • feat(EditorTerminalPlugin): add i18n and Tests placeholder
  • feat(file-tree-v2): display hidden files (dotfiles) like VSCode
  • feat(file-tree-v2): restore drag and drop support
  • feat(i18n): add table parameter to LumiPluginLocalization in Aliyun and Zhipu plugins
  • feat(i18n): extract plugin localization into LumiLocalizationKit package
  • feat(llm-provider-status): add isBlocking + StepFun sub-agent gate
  • feat(LumiAppKit): add theme-related localization strings
  • feat(LumiAppKit): extract reusable logic from LumiApp into facade package
  • feat(LumiAppKit): localize commands and settings views via LumiLocalizationKit
  • feat(LumiCoreKit): add LumiCoreKitResources
